"https://api.github.com/users/Kocal", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49209", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 1.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Description

`Symfony\UX\LiveComponent\Controller\BatchActionController::__invoke()` iterates over the client-supplied `actions` array and issues a full `HttpKernel` sub-request for each entry (event subscribers, validators, Doctrine, rendering). The array size is never bounded, so an authenticated client can submit a single `_batch` request containing thousands of actions and exhaust CPU, memory, and database connections on the application server.

### Resolution

`BatchActionController` now enforces an upper bound of 50 actions per `_batch` request (`MAX_ACTIONS_PER_BATCH`) and rejects larger payloads up front with a `BadRequestHttpException`. The matching JavaScript backend was also updated to split larger client-side batches into multiple requests so legitimate usage isn't affected.

The patch for this issue is available [here](https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/95e878d5257f13d6d652ca95e3ef6bb0934d674f) for branch 2.x (and forward-ported to 3.x).

### Credits

Symfony would like to thank Pascal Cescon for reporting the issue and Hugo Alliaume for providing the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00268, "percentile": 0.18628}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mm82-c99c-h2cf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T19:34:45Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mm82-c99c-h2cf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mm82-c99c-h2cf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49209"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T19:34:45Z", "references": ["https://github.com/symfony/ux/security/advisories/GHSA-mm82-c99c-h2cf", "https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/95e878d5257f13d6d652ca95e3ef6bb0934d674f", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/symfony/ux-live-component/CVE-2026-49209.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mm82-c99c-h2cf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/symfony/ux/security-advisories/GHSA-mm82-c99c-h2cf", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/symfony/ux", "summary": "symfony/ux-live-component: Denial of service via unbounded batch action requests", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T19:34:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mm82-c99c-h2cf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.36.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-live-component"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.5.0, < 2.36.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-live-component"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: symfony/ux-live-component: Denial of service via unbounded batch action requests
